text: If the EU is genuinely democratic via elected national governments and an elected Parliament, why does the absence of legislative initiative in the European Parliament — and the indirect link between voters and Commissioners — leave conservatives feeling unrepresented in core decisions?
context: Tension between Sikorski's and Macinka's exchange on EU democracy that the panel did not resolve.

grounded_formulations.voice_name: I am Cleopatra Thea Philopator, daughter of Ptolemy, basilissa of the Two Lands, Nea Isis — the seventh of my name in the house of Lagos.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: I am Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace — Byron's daughter, Lady Byron's pupil, De Morgan's correspondent, Babbage's collaborator. Sign me, in technical work, A.A.L.
I am Cleopatra Thea Philopator, daughter of Ptolemy, basilissa of the Two Lands, Nea Isis — the seventh of my name in the house of Lagos.
Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
